memberdef.argsstring: (self, str server, int port, str did, bool use_tls=False)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Initialize signaling client.
Args: server: Signaling server hostname port: Signaling server port did: Device ID use_tls: Whether to use TLS/WSS

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str did, str public_ip, int public_port, str nat_type="unknown", list capabilities=None)
memberdef.name: register_device

para.verbatim:
Register device with signaling server.
Args: did: Device ID public_ip: Public IP address public_port: Public UDP port nat_type: Detected NAT type capabilities: List of supported capabilities
Returns: Registration response

Query device information from signaling server.
Args: did: Device ID to query
Returns: Device information

Request connection to a device.
Args: target_did: Target device ID use_relay: Whether to request relay mode
Returns: Connection response with peer info

Accept an incoming connection request.
Args: request_id: Connection request ID
Returns: Accept response

Reject an incoming connection request.
Args: request_id: Connection request ID reason: Rejection reason
Returns: Reject response

Request relay server for connection.
Args: target_did: Target device ID
Returns: Relay server information

Register event handler.
Args: event_type: Event type to handle handler: Async callback function

Send request to signaling server.
Args: method: Request method payload: Request payload
Returns: Response data

Client for communicating with the signaling server.
Handles device registration, discovery, and connection coordination.
